Use clip-path instead of overflow:hidden for island clipping

overflow:hidden + border-radius is unreliable on mobile Safari during
animations. clip-path: inset(0% round Xpx) creates a true compositor-level
clip that Safari respects. Animate clipPath alongside borderRadius in both
expand and collapse.

commit.message:
Use fragment-scoped rerun for band operations in dialogs

Fixes page flashing and duplicate band bugs when adding, reordering,
or removing bands. st.rerun(scope="fragment") reruns only the dialog
instead of the full page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: only show Remove button on localStorage-only trips (#600)

Trips where the user is the creator or has a linked participant will
reappear on the next fetch from Supabase, making Remove ineffective.
Now only show Remove when the trip is localStorage-only (not created
by user and no linked participant). Hide is always available.

Co-authored-by: Kristjan Elias <kristjanelias@Kairis-MacBook-Air.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Z3 timeout: add cumulative wall-clock limit per size

The Z3 timeout was per-check() call, not cumulative. With max_models=10
and 60s timeout for heavy sigs, a single size could take up to 600s
(10 × 60s). Now the total wall time for all model iterations at one
size is capped to the same budget as a single check() call. Each
subsequent check() gets a shrinking timeout from the remaining budget.

This was the root cause of inspect hanging for 445s+ on size 10.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复Fragment ID重复导致视频生成混淆的严重bug并添加自动修复机制

问题根源：
- 使用 Date.now() 生成 Fragment ID 时，同一毫秒内创建的场景会产生相同的 ID
- handleUpdateFragment 会遍历所有场景更新匹配的 fragment ID
- 导致多个场景的首个镜头生成相同的视频和生成信息
- 选中状态也会出现多个镜头同时高亮的问题

修复内容：
1. 创建唯一的 ID 生成工具 (src/utils/generateId.ts)
   - 使用时间戳 + 随机数 + 计数器三重保障确保唯一性
   - 新建项目不会再产生重复 ID

2. 修复 handleUpdateFragment 函数逻辑
   - 只更新当前选中场景中的 fragment
   - 即使有重复 ID，也只会更新当前选中的场景
   - 从根本上防止多场景同时更新的问题

3. 添加项目加载时自动检测和修复功能
   - 检测重复的 Fragment ID 并自动生成唯一 ID
   - 修复完成后自动提示用户刷新页面
   - 无需手动执行修复命令

4. 添加调试工具 (window.debugOctopusAI)
   - check(): 检查所有 Fragment ID 是否重复
   - fix(): 手动修复重复的 Fragment ID
   - panel(): 打开可视化调试面板

5. 优化编辑器自动填充逻辑
   - 对于已有视频的镜头，不再自动填充 Seedance 2.0 提示词
   - 避免点击已有视频镜头时出现"编辑器未就绪"错误

影响范围：
- 已有项目：加载时自动检测并修复重复 ID
- 新建项目：自动使用唯一 ID，不会出现重复问题
- 一键成片：视频生成不再混淆，每个镜头生成独立的视频

commit.message:
Add dialogue context awareness with stat-reactive NPC branches

Extends DialogueContext with player stats (enemiesKilled, bossesKilled,
secretsFound, trapsDisarmed, chestsOpened, levelsCleared, maxDungeonLevel,
startingLocation). Adds 6 new condition types for dialogue gating.

Barkeep reacts to: 50+ kills (monster wanted posters, Korrin the Vast
record), 3+ secrets (his terrible map, Garvus's dungeon horse), boss kills
(celebratory drinks, boss immune system lore), cave starting location
(goblin escape memories, Thessaly's disappearance).

Stranger reacts to: 5+ levels cleared (dungeon reads you back, curriculum
theory), secrets found (traps as poetry, Room 47 convergence), village
origin (ley lines grew Willowmere, love as illegible weapon), tavern
origin (story smuggler, Empress Valthira the Adequate).

Morrigan reacts to: 10+ chests (supply chain outrage, shoplifting from a
labyrinth), 5+ levels (loyalty tiers, premium stock access).

Corwin reacts to: 25+ kills (the rat that sighed, universe's smallest
disappointment), secrets found (hypercube dungeon theory, 4D cartography).

commit.message:
treatise Ch 6 §18: refine scope note per Nova/Bishop thread

Replace "analyzes cooperative agents" (stable category claim) with
"concerns agents who enter the process cooperatively" (starting
classification). Add explicit acknowledgment that honest inquiry
within a cooperative process cannot be fully bounded downstream.

Nova's formulation: starting classification, not guaranteed endpoint.
Bishop: confirms the "entered cooperatively" phrasing is the right fix.
Consistent with treatise's epistemic posture on every hard question.
v1.7.2.

fix: spool-first product generation and duplicate prefix removal

CRITICAL BUG FIX: itertools.product iterated rightmost segments first,
meaning the spool_type segment (3rd from left) would never change within
the first 500 combinations — all products had the SAME spool type.

New spool-first strategy:
- Identify the spool_type segment as the primary differentiator
- Generate one product per spool type (the key for competitor matching)
- Other variable segments use first option as default
- Available alternatives stored in 'available_options' spec field
- Falls back to Cartesian product when no spool segment exists

Also fixes duplicate prefix bug where LLM template + segment values
both contained the series prefix (e.g. 'DG4V-3DG4V-3...')

All 358 tests pass (was 357)

commit.message:
Convert Swift uuidv7 library to JavaScript with class-based API

## Summary
Completed conversion of https://github.com/mhayes853/swift-uuidv7 to JavaScript.
Refactored from function-based to class-based static methods matching Swift idioms.

## Changes
- pkg/tools/src/js/uuidv7.mjs
  * UUIDV7 class with static methods (not functions)
  * UUIDV7.create() - generate monotonically increasing UUID
  * UUIDV7.compare(a, b) - lexicographic comparison (-1, 0, 1)
  * UUIDV7.isLessThan(a, b), UUIDV7.isGreaterThan(a, b) - convenience
  * MonotonicityState - tracks timestamp + 12-bit sequence counter
  * Default export: UUIDV7

- pkg/tools/test/js/uuidv7.mjs
  * 11 tests using vitest framework (ported from Swift test suite)
  * Tests strict monotonicity, uniqueness, format compliance
  * All 11 tests passing (82ms)

- pkg/tools/index.mjs
  * Added UUIDV7 to JS namespace exports
  * Usage: import { JS } from '@sc-voice/tools'; JS.UUIDV7.create()

## Testing
✓ npm run test: All 206 tests passing (20 test files)
✓ test/js/uuidv7.mjs: 11 tests passing
  - 10,000 uniqueness iterations
  - 100+ burst generation (strict ordering)
  - 5,000 call uniqueness verification
  - RFC 9562 version/variant validation
  - Timestamp consistency within millisecond

## Implementation Notes
- Monotonic guarantee: successive calls always produce strictly increasing UUIDs
- Sequence overflow (>4095): forces timestamp forward, resets counter
- Node.js crypto module for randomBytes
- BigInt for timestamp bit manipulation (48 bits)

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(add): support tabular parquet as auxiliary assets (#190)

* feat(add): support tabular parquet as auxiliary assets

Add support for parquet files without geometry to be tracked as auxiliary
assets alongside primary geo-assets (Issue #177).

Changes:
- Add .parquet to TABULAR_EXTENSIONS constant for non-geo handling
- Add _is_parquet_no_geometry_error helper to detect bbox/geometry errors
- Modify add_files to defer non-geo parquet files like CSV/TSV
- Add unit tests for tabular parquet handling

Per ADR-0028, tabular parquet files (census metadata, lookup tables) should
be tracked as auxiliary assets when they exist alongside a primary GeoParquet
file in the same item directory.

Closes #177

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(add): address PR #190 review issues for tabular parquet support

Replace fragile string-pattern matching with typed NoGeometryError exception,
fix asymmetric control flow in exception handlers, and add comprehensive tests.

Changes:
- Add NoGeometryError(ValueError) custom exception in errors.py
- Refactor _pre_validate_geometry and post-conversion bbox check to raise
  NoGeometryError instead of plain ValueError
- Replace _is_parquet_no_geometry_error string matching with isinstance check
- Add explicit continue to ClickException handler (symmetry fix)
- Remove dead TABULAR_EXTENSIONS guard (parquet is always in TABULAR_EXTENSIONS)
- Remove _PARQUET_NO_GEOMETRY_PATTERNS and _is_parquet_no_geometry_error (dead code)

Tests added:
- Direct unit tests for NoGeometryError (isinstance, message format, attributes)
- Negative case: non-geometry ValueErrors still propagate
- GeoParquet success path regression test
- Fixed test_tabular_parquet_added_as_auxiliary_asset to assert core feature
- Hypothesis property-based tests for tabular parquet (3 properties)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(add): clean up orphaned artifacts and preserve primary asset

Address PR #190 review feedback:

1. Clean up generated artifacts before raising NoGeometryError
   - Extract _cleanup_orphaned_output helper to reduce complexity
   - If conversion succeeds but produces no geometry, delete the
     output_path and any sidecars before raising the error
   - Prevents orphaned files in item directories
   - Logs cleanup actions at debug level, warns on cleanup failure

2. Preserve existing primary asset in _update_item_with_asset
   - Check existing item's assets for "data" role first
   - Use that asset as primary instead of blindly picking first
     .parquet/.tif (which could be a newly-added tabular file)
   - Falls back to directory scanning only if no "data" role found

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(add): extract helper function to reduce complexity

- Extract _process_deferred_non_geo_files() from add_files()
- Simplify exception handlers to reduce cyclomatic complexity
- Reduces add_files complexity from 22 (D) to 19 (C)
- All functions now meet xenon max-absolute=C threshold

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: 实现 OpenClaw 对齐的上下文超限处理 + 飞书 requireMention

## 上下文超限处理 (对齐 OpenClaw)
1. **ContextErrors.kt** - 错误检测
   - 严格检测: isContextOverflowError()
   - 启发式检测: isLikelyContextOverflowError()
   - 支持中英文错误消息、OpenRouter/Anthropic 格式

2. **MessageCompactor.kt** - 消息压缩
   - 使用 LLM (带 extended thinking) 总结旧消息
   - 保留最近 N 条消息 (默认 3 条)
   - 降级策略: LLM 失败时生成简单统计摘要

3. **ToolResultTruncator.kt** - 工具结果截断
   - 截断超大工具结果 (>4000 字符)
   - 保留头尾 (前 1500 + 后 1500 字符)

4. **ContextManager.kt** - 上下文管理器
   - 多层恢复策略 (对齐 OpenClaw run.ts):
     1. Compaction (最多 3 次)
     2. 工具结果截断 (1 次)
     3. 放弃并返回错误
   - 消息格式转换 (新旧格式互转)

5. **AgentLoop.kt** - 集成上下文管理
   - 在异常处理中自动检测上下文超限
   - 调用 ContextManager 恢复
   - 新增进度事件: ContextOverflow, ContextRecovered

## 飞书 requireMention (对齐 OpenClaw)
6. **FeishuClient.kt**
   - 添加 getBotInfo() - 调用 /open-apis/bot/v3/info
   - 获取机器人 open_id 和 name

7. **FeishuChannel.kt**
   - 启动时调用 getBotInfo() 获取 botOpenId
   - 提供 getBotOpenId() 供外部查询

8. **MyApplication.kt (handleFeishuEvent)**
   - 检查群消息的 requireMention 配置
   - 支持 @_all (视为 @所有机器人)
   - 检查 mentions 列表是否包含机器人 open_id
   - 未 @机器人的消息直接忽略

9. **config/openclaw-community.json.example**
   - 飞书和 Discord 的 requireMention 配置示例

## 架构对齐
- 完全对齐 OpenClaw 的上下文处理策略
- 对齐 OpenClaw bot.ts checkBotMentioned 逻辑
- 使用相同的配置格式和参数

fix: recover from HLS media errors instead of crashing

The 'bufferAppendError' (MEDIA_ERROR) was immediately showing an error
without attempting recovery. Now uses hls.recoverMediaError() on first
failure; only shows the error if recovery also fails.

Also reduced buffer sizes (30s/60s instead of 60s/120s) to reduce
memory pressure that can trigger SourceBuffer errors on low-RAM devices.

Fix test assertions and Gini bootstrap variance formula

- Remove fixed seed from bootstrap variance estimator (was causing
  degenerate z-statistics when both periods used seed=42)
- Fix SE formula: bootstrap variance already estimates Var(G_hat),
  no additional 1/n scaling needed
- Correct test expectations: Gini of 0.5 is correct for a perfectly-ranked
  binary model with 50% claim rate (max achievable Gini = 1 - claim_rate)
- Fix PSI test: a 1-sigma mean shift gives PSI > 0.25 (red, not amber)
- Add no-cacheprovider flag to Databricks test runner

All 102 tests pass on Databricks serverless.

commit.message:
fix: add explicit --livereload flag to serve command

Click 8.3.x has a regression where flag_value options don't respect
default=True correctly. The --no-livereload/--livereload pair in mkdocs
defaults to False instead of True, silently disabling file watching.
Passing --livereload explicitly fixes live reload on Docker/macOS.

commit.message:
Enable buy buttons and set availability to InStock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Agent Teams toggle with tmux statusbar indicator

- Add [Teams]/[Solo] indicator to statusbar next to model name
- Installer offers to add shell helpers (cc, cct) to .zshrc/.bashrc
- cc: launches claude with CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 when enabled
- cct: toggles agent teams on/off, state persisted in ~/.claude/.agent-teams

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: claude-tmux-statusbar
repository.description: Custom tmux statusbar for Claude Code — shows model, context, rate limits, cost, git status. Tokyo Night theme.

commit.message:
chore: marker footer-justeringer som fullfort, arkiver oppgave

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove nested <main> causing React #310 hydration error

Root layout already provides <main> landmark (a11y fix). SidebarShell
had a second <main> causing "main cannot be descendant of main" in
React 19. Changed to <div>.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
